articles.title: Big Breaking: CTI Proposes 5% VAT Cap to Cut Fuel Prices by ‚āĻ15
articles.description: The Chamber of Trade and Industry (CTI) Chairman Brijesh Goyal has written to Petroleum Minister Hardeep Singh Puri, proposing a uniform 5% VAT on petrol and diesel across all states for the next three months. He claims this could reduce fuel prices by ‚āĻ10‚Äď‚āĻ15 per litre, as fuel is outside GST and state taxes cause major price differences. Meanwhile, the All India Motor Transport Congress has expressed strong concern, stating that the transport sector is suffering from repeated fuel hikes and calling it a ‚Äúslow poison‚ÄĚ for the industry. They argue that instead of frequent small increases, a single large revision would help businesses plan better. Fuel prices have risen for the fourth time in 11 days, with petrol up ‚āĻ2.61 and diesel ‚āĻ2.71 per litre. Analysts also compared global fuel price trends, noting that while many countries have seen much higher increases over the years, India‚Äôs rise is relatively lower at around 7‚Äď8%. However, public reactions in cities like Lucknow reflect growing concern over rising daily expenses and uncertainty about future hikes.

articles.title: Following Neena Gupta‚Äôs Route, Meenakshi Seshadri Publicly Asks Bollywood For Work After 30 Years
articles.description: Veteran actress Meenakshi Seshadri returns to Mumbai after 30 years in the US, seeking strong film and OTT roles, saying she wants meaningful work not stardom.

articles.title: Taga Ram Bheel, Who Took Thar Music Global, Will Be Honoured with Padma Shri
articles.description: Taga Ram Bheel, renowned maestro of the Algoza, will be honoured with the Padma Shri for his exceptional contribution to preserving and promoting the traditional folk music of the Thar Desert. Hailing from Jaisalmer, Rajasthan, he has dedicated his life to mastering and popularising the dual flute instrument, performing across India and internationally, and showcasing the rich cultural heritage of Rajasthan‚Äôs desert communities. His lifelong efforts have helped keep the soulful traditions of Algoza music alive for future generations.

articles.description: Campaigning for Colombia's May 31 presidential elections wrapped up Sunday, with the left battling to hold on to power during a dramatic uptick in violence. articles.title: BJP plunged country into ‚Äėeconomic crisis‚Äô: Akhilesh
articles.description: Addressing party leaders and workers from various districts at the SP headquarters in Lucknow on Sunday, Yadav said that after nearly 12 years in power at the Centre, the BJP had failed to control the economy, making life increasingly difficult for the common man with soaring prices, unemployment, and corruption reaching new heights.

articles.title: Bihar lags in PNG rollout as Centre plans LPG-free zones
articles.description: Bihar has achieved only 31.2% of its piped natural gas (PNG) connection target set for completion by March by the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (PNGRB) even as the Centre plans to notify liquefied petroleum gas (LPG)-free zones amid concerns over supply disruptions and rising import costs due to the ongoing West Asia conflict, officials said on Sunday.

articles.title: ‚ÄėDancing on bones of dead‚Äô: Russia 'HUMILIATED' for 'killing children' in dramatic UN confrontation
articles.description: A dramatic confrontation erupted at the United Nations Security Council as representatives from the United States and United Kingdom sharply condemned Russia over the ongoing war in Ukraine during a heated and emotional debate.

articles.title: Women killed after husband attacks her with TV set in Thane, accused held
articles.description: Thane Murder: A domestic dispute in Thane's Balyani area led to a tragic crime where husband Satish Waghe allegedly murdered his wife by smashing a TV on her head. Police arrested him post-incident, marking a critical case under murder charges.

articles.title: Screenwriters Association Awards 2026: Aryan Khan wins big for Ba***ds of Bollywood; check out full list of winners
articles.description: 7th Screenwriters Association Awards: Aryan Khan clinches debut writing title as The Ba***ds of Bollywood dominates.

articles.title: MPESB announces Skill Test and document verification dates for Subedar and ASI posts; download admit card here
articles.description: MPESB recruitment 2026: MPESB recruitment 2026: The Madhya Pradesh Employees Selection Board has announced the Skill Test and Document Verification schedule for recruitment to 500 Subedar and Assistant Sub-Inspector posts. The process will be conducted in Bhopal from June 2 to June 4, 2026, for candidates who cleared the written examination. The recruitment stage includes stenography and typing tests, Aadhaar e-KYC verification, and document checks. Candidates must download the information letter from the official website and report with original certificates and self-attested photocopies.

articles.title: Two Trades for Today: An AMC major for a gain of 5.9%, a mid-cap auto ancillary stock for a rise of about 6%
articles.description: Our technical analysts identify select stocks every trading day that may gain momentum even in volatile markets. Here are the technical calls for today.

articles.title: Cracks Surface On Bihar‚Äôs Araria Bridge After Pillar Subsides, Heavy Traffic Barred
articles.description: Authorities in Bihar‚Äôs Araria district have restricted heavy traffic on the Jhamta Mahishakol bridge after one of its pillars reportedly subsided, causing visible cracks in the structure. Built in 2022, the bridge is a crucial link for several flood-affected villages. Officials have directed the contractor to repair the damage as concerns rise over repeated bridge failures in Bihar.

articles.title: Ebola Outbreak: India Issues Travel Advisory For 3 African Nations
articles.description: The Indian government has taken precautionary measures to reduce possible health risks and protect travellers. India has also confirmed that no case linked to this Ebola strain has been reported in...

articles.title: 'Possibility Of Good News In Coming Hours': Rubio's Big Iran Hint From India
articles.description: Rubio stated that developments could take place in the coming hours and indicated that "good news" related to the Strait situation could emerge soon.

articles.title: New-Gen VinFast VF8 Electric SUV Revealed With 500 Km Range
articles.description: The new-generation VinFast VF8 has been revealed in the Vietnam market with updated styling, more tech, 500 km range and more.

articles.title: Will the rift between exhibitors and producers in Telangana affect Ram Charan-Janhvi Kapoor's Peddi? Explained
articles.description: The Telangana Exhibitors Association remains firm on allowing films to release only on a percentage-sharing basis, rather than on a rental basis, for Peddi.

articles.title: Farhan Akhtar takes Don 3 dispute with Ranveer Singh to FWICE; decision expected Monday
articles.description: Farhan Akhtar took legal action against Ranveer Singh following his departure from Don 3.

articles.title: ‚ÄėSuperficial and unstable approach‚Äô: Palaniswami slams TN govt over long power cuts, urges action
articles.description: Edappadi K. Palaniswami criticised the Tamil Nadu government over reported power disruptions across the state, accusing the administration of poor handling of electricity management.
